working_on: Fourth project health-check audit (cadence-overdue catch-up; window S-0053 → S-0064). Cadence trigger fired at S-0062, deferred for Issue #17 work; re-fired at S-0063, deferred for Issue #18 documentation; re-fired at S-0064, deferred for Issue #18+#19 fix; re-fires at S-0065 with overdue-by-3 surface, audit accepted by user explicit hint.
declared_scope: Run engine/tools/scan_orphans.py + read last 10 archives for soft-warn / scope-delivery / transcript-pct telemetry; triage 24 dead-weight candidates against the operative diagnostic; surface at least one non-obvious finding beyond scanner output; author docs/health-checks/S-0065.md per the report template; apply any fix-in-context corrective actions (S-0057 archive field backfill if appropriate; transcript_token_pct absence root-cause if quick); bump last_audit_session via engine/tools/health_check.py emit; run shutdown sequence.
outcome_summary: Fourth health-check audit closed. Three non-obvious findings surfaced beyond the dead-weight scanner: (A) S-0057 archive missing outcome_summary_soft_warns field despite the audit at S-0055 designed to prevent exactly this — root cause not definitively identified; filed Issue #20 for archive-history audit pass. (B) transcript_token_pct None in 15 of 24 archives since ADR 0049 wired it (62%; 9 of last 10) — filesystem heuristics fail in routine-mode contexts; filed Issue #21 with two candidate fixes. (C) Meta-pattern: defenses acknowledged-as-incomplete at design time activate as gaps; pair every out-of-scope with a tracked Issue, not just a docstring. 24 dead-weight candidates triaged, all preserve. Cadence stays at 10; average gap 12 sessions vs target 10 (within post-S-0041 envelope). last_audit_session bumped S-0052 → S-0065 (clears health_check_overdue soft-warn).

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope ran end-to-end: dead-weight scanner output (24 candidates) consumed and triaged; last 10 archives read for telemetry signal; three non-obvious findings (A: S-0057 archive lapse; B: transcript_token_pct None pattern; C: meta-pattern annotation) surfaced beyond scanner output and given concrete dispositions (Issues #20, #21 filed; meta-pattern named); report authored at docs/health-checks/S-0065.md per template; last_audit_session bumped S-0052 → S-0065 via direct register_state.json edit (the auto-tool's emit_report would overwrite the hand-authored report); STATE.md / ENGINE_LOG.md updated; shutdown sequence run. The S-0057 archive backfill was deliberately deferred (editing record-of-record); the transcript_token_pct root-cause fix was deliberately deferred (substantive scope expansion to a new tool path; tracked as Issue #21 cross-session). Both deferrals are explicit and named in the report's dispositions.
